final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays, intended for Instagram Stories sharing.

Style/medium: Korean café aesthetic smartphone photo with hand-drawn white-pen sketch annotations overlaid — one-stroke rough style, slightly uneven lines, magazine rough-notes feel, Instagram Stories format
Composition: flat-lay or slightly angled overhead shot of coffee and desserts arranged on a café table, no people, negative space preserved around annotated elements
Subject: artisan coffee drink (latte or similar) and at least one dessert (cake slice or pastry), arranged as a Korean café styled still life; each element has a white-pen hand-drawn outline tracing its silhouette, with arrows or dashed lines guiding the eye between items
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior surface — marble or wooden table, soft natural light, no people
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, diffused natural window light — airy and calm, Instagram-worthy
Color palette: muted warm tones (cream, beige, dusty rose, soft brown) typical of Korean café aesthetic
Materials/textures: ceramic cup, glazed pastry surface, linen or marble table surface
Text (verbatim): handwritten Japanese annotations in hiragana (7 parts) and simple kanji (3 parts), short diary-style murmur comments per element —
  • coffee → taste/temperature/mood comment (e.g., やさしい あまさ ☁️)
  • dessert → texture/deliciousness comment (e.g., しっとり… さいこう)
  • space/atmosphere → mood comment (e.g., ゆったり した じかん)
  • overall one-liner (e.g., しあわせ すぎた〜 ♡)
  white-pen dashed lines and arrows connecting text to each element; small decorative accents: steam wisps above coffee, tiny sparkle stars ✦, heart ♡, small emoji-like faces — used sparingly
Constraints: no people or human figures; white-pen annotation lines must look hand-drawn, one-stroke, slightly rough and uneven, not digital-clean; annotations must not overcrowd — preserve breathing space / white space between elements
Avoid: overly polished digital vector lines, Western café aesthetic, cluttered layout, text in any language other than Japanese, people or hands in frame
